message:
refactor(deps): migrate Cloudflare deploy and model download from reqwest to asupersync HTTP

Complete the reqwest removal by migrating the two remaining HTTP-heavy
modules to asupersync::http::h1:

Cloudflare deploy (pages/deploy_cloudflare.rs):
- Replace all reqwest::blocking HTTP calls with asupersync::http::h1
- Add run_cloudflare_with_cx() helper (single-threaded runtime, Cx
  spawn, mpsc channel polling)
- Add cloudflare_api_headers(), execute_cloudflare_request(),
  execute_cloudflare_multipart_request() helpers
- Convert all API functions (check_project_exists_api,
  create_project_api, deploy_with_api, fetch_upload_token,
  check_missing_hashes, upload_bucket, upsert_hashes, upload_assets)
- Multipart: asupersync::http::h1::MultipartForm replaces reqwest
- Add API_TIMEOUT_SECS constant
- Remove &Client parameter threading

Model download (search/model_download.rs):
- Replace reqwest::blocking streaming with asupersync HTTP streaming
- Add run_download_with_cx() helper (same runtime-spawn-poll pattern)
- Rewrite download_file to use HttpClient::request_streaming() with
  frame-based body consumption (poll_frame, Frame::Data, Buf)
- Handle Range-resume, timeout via asupersync::time::timeout
- Change ProgressCallback from Box<dyn Fn> to Arc<dyn Fn>
- Move file I/O inside the async closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
